content: You can't move the folder to its subfolder

comment.text: This translation key is used for displaying an error message when attempting to move a folder into its own subfolder in the FilesSelector component. The message appears as an alert after selecting a file or folder.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Armenian translation is grammatically incomplete and logically incorrect. It ends with 'ենթաթղթապանակ' (subfolder) without a preposition or a verb indicating 'into' or 'to', making the sentence 'You can't move the folder to its subfolder' sound like 'You can't move the folder to its subfolder [noun phrase]'. It lacks the necessary case ending or preposition to convey the direction of movement.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Դուք չեք կարող պանակը տեղափոխել իր ենթաթղթապանակի մեջ

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Romanian translation 'subdosarul propriu' translates to 'its own subfolder', which implies the folder is being moved into a subfolder that belongs to it. However, the English logic and context describe the error of moving a folder into one of its own descendants (a subfolder). The Romanian phrasing is awkward and slightly changes the logical relationship intended by the error message.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Nu puteți muta folderul într-unul dintre subfolderele sale

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Sinhala translation says 'A container cannot be moved to its sub-container' (බහාලුමක්...), whereas the English text specifically refers to 'the folder' (singular/specific). More importantly, the Sinhala grammar implies a general rule rather than the specific error message intended for the user action.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: ඔබට එම ෆෝල්ඩරය එහි උප ෆෝල්ඩරයකට ගෙන යාමට නොහැකිය
